product_name: Orion Aluminum Case w/ Telescope Eyepieces & 1.25" Color-Filter Set
attributes: Orion • Aluminum Hard Case + Key • 6-Filter Color/ND Set (#12 Yellow, #23 Orange, #25 Red, #58 Green, #80A Blue, 0.9 ND) • 1.25" Eyepieces (bagged) • Like-New
condition_notes: Orion (Orion Telescopes & Binoculars) silver aluminum hard case — foam egg-crate lid, fitted lower tray, latches and key. Contents (confirmed from 2026-06-20 detail photos): a full 1.25" filter set in individual snap cases — #12 Yellow, #23 Orange, #25 Red, #58 Green, #80A Blue, and a 0.9 Neutral Density — plus several 1.25" telescope eyepieces (factory-bagged; focal lengths not yet recorded). Accessories appear unused/like-new. Sold as one lot. The filter set alone is a premium 6-piece color/ND kit; assembling the lot new piecemeal runs well past $180.

square.buy_link_note: Square checkout 2026-06-20: $85 + $16 flat shipping = $101; asks for shipping address. Repriced 65->85 after the 6/20 detail pics documented a full 6-piece color/ND filter set; old link DAF4FC4XIRRRVPWC deleted. Added a filters detail image to the catalog item.

ebay.note: Draft to be created. Filter set documented (6pc color/ND). Still read eyepiece focal lengths before publish to move the top of range.
